summary:
This is the Metalua copmiler, packaged as a rock, depending
           on the spearate metalua-parser AST generating library. It
           compiles a superset of Lua 5.1 into bytecode, which can
           then be loaded and executed by a Lua 5.1 VM. It also allows
           to dump ASTs back into Lua source files.
raw_content:
This is the Metalua copmiler, packaged as a rock, depending
           on the spearate metalua-parser AST generating library. It
           compiles a superset of Lua 5.1 into bytecode, which can
           then be loaded and executed by a Lua 5.1 VM. It also allows
           to dump ASTs back into Lua source files.
generated_summary: metalua-compiler is a library for compiling Lua 5.1 into bytecode complete usually used in the fields of metalua.
phase1: A Lua compiler that compiles a superset of Lua 5.1 into bytecode, allowing for dynamic execution with a Lua 5.1 VM.
phase2: Supports the generation of Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) for code analysis and transformation.
phase3: Allows dumping of ASTs back into Lua source files for easy debugging and inspection.
